criteria.insufficientDetail: Incorrect-option feedback has at least 100 characters and 16 words, enough room to identify the misconception and teach the relevant distinction.
criteria.genericTemplate: Feedback avoids known stock phrases that merely reject an option or announce the supported response.
criteria.choiceRestatement: Feedback does not begin by repeating a substantial portion of the selected option.
criteria.fullKeyEcho: Feedback explains the distinction instead of appending the complete correct option as a repeated answer cue.
criteria.limitation: These heuristics find likely editorial problems; they cannot prove conceptual accuracy, pedagogical usefulness, or independent expert validation.
